title: psychotria amboniana subsp. amboniana
intro: Psychotria amboniana subsp. amboniana, also known as Ambon wild coffee or wild coffee, is a plant species belonging to the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Psychotria amboniana subsp. amboniana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
